s_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7382614656243731481","book_info":{"abstract":"此书接力《小警大用》《真探大用》后的第三部，分为1册和2册，以区分悬案内容不同。新书从杜大用调入部里五局外派到闵省开始，从闵省平楠大山迷案开始，这本书更加着重于案件本质，会从更多纬度去剖析案件，也会更多在侦查学，勘查学，法医学，心理学上进行艺术加工，期盼老粉丝和新读者一起再次见证大用破案！《悬案大用1》会有五个不同类型的案件，每个故事都不会很拖沓，尽量会在四十万字左右写明白一个案件。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/fa69761fd72637c634e0f53b327212dd","author":"顺手牵虎","author_id":"","book_id":"7382614656243731481","book_name":"杜大用悬案侦缉笔记","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#303030","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2.6万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{\"category_id\":751,\"name\":\"悬疑灵异\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=751\u0026name=悬疑灵异\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":10,\"name\":\"悬疑\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=10\u0026name=悬疑\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":61,\"name\":\"推理\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=61\u0026name=推理\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":505,\"name\":\"破案\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=505\u0026name=破案\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7383006216890352153","read_count":"25234","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"2097970"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.6","serial_count":"1358","tags":"悬疑灵异,推理,破案,悬疑","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/a886ffdb3f60a46142de2e371affee47~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1779258006\u0026x-signature=Zoxt9C6y1ypWCHIm2rkuKl9lkUY%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1187119163516750","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"3"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"202603
